params.name: Sholes' Typewriter
params.description:
On Dec 11, 1866, Christopher Sholes invented the QWERTY keyboard.

In the past, people were often worried that fast typing would cause the typewriter to break down. Sholes deliberately jumbled up the alphabet order, so that the letters seemed to be arranged on the keyboard randomly. Based on research, such layout was likely created by Sholes randomly and has been used in keyboards every since.

[Original Keyboard Layout]

Row 1: NOPQRSTUVWXZY

Row 2: ABCDEFGHIJKLM

Current layout: Look at your o …
